steps.title: Coat a 6 well plate coat with gelatin 0
steps.instruction: Coat a 6 well plate coat with gelatin 0.1% or Geltrex LDEV Free hESC Quality 5 ml Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #A1413302 1:100

steps.title: Collect 10-20 spheres and place in...
steps.instruction: Collect 10-20 spheres and place in a 6 well plate (day 40+ spheres)

steps.title: Add 1 mL of TrypLE™ Select...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of TrypLE™ Select Enzyme (1X), no phenol red Thermo Fisher Catalog #12563011 for 00:05:00

steps.title: Triturate using glass a pipette (2-3 up and down)
steps.instruction: Triturate using glass a pipette (2-3 up and down)

steps.title: Transfer the cells and tissue (even...
steps.instruction: Transfer the cells and tissue (even the chunks, the trituration is more effective if you have chunks of tissue) to the coated 6 well plate

steps.title: Add 3 mL of astrocyte media ( https://www
Half media change media every 3...
steps.instruction: Half media change media every 3 days or until it turns orange.

steps.title: Keep changing media every 3d until...
steps.instruction: Keep changing media every 3d until you observe good amount of cell attached to the plate (may vary according to the patterning)

steps.title: Passage the astrocytes to a gelatin...
steps.instruction: Passage the astrocytes to a gelatin or geltrex coated 15 cm plate in Astrocyte media once they reach 80% confluency

steps.title: For the experimental protocols after passage...
steps.instruction: For the experimental protocols after passage cell will be incubated in maturation media (TBD)
